title: Cold Dynasty Campaign
description: A reference-dependent prestige-series campaign: one square ensemble key art establishes the cast pyramid, then three adaptations preserve the same identities and power dynamics.
creative_direction: Use a single fictional dynasty-drama ensemble as the campaign anchor. Image 01 defines the dominant matriarch, the heir, the rival branch, and the fixer. Images 02-04 must feel like the same premium streaming series while shifting crop logic, setting temperature, and emotional tension without losing hierarchy.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Cold Dynasty Campaign
en.description: One fictional prestige-drama key art expands into three campaign adaptations while preserving the same ensemble hierarchy.

zh-CN.title: 冷色王朝系列
zh-CN.description: 一张虚构精品家族剧主视觉延展成三张系列变体,始终保留同一阵容层级和权力关系。
